title: SOA-Harness v1.1 LLM Dispatch Request
description: Normative schema for the dispatcher request envelope passed to a provider adapter per Core §16.3. The dispatcher validates every request against this schema BEFORE any provider call; schema failure returns DispatcherError with dispatcher_error_code DispatcherRequestInvalid (§24 -32110).

model.description: Free-form provider-adapter model identifier. The spec makes no claim about valid values; the per-adapter contract defines acceptable strings.

tools.description: Optional — provider-native tool descriptors. Adapters MAY map the Runner's §11 registry into this field; adapters MAY ignore it entirely for providers that do not support native tool schemas.

budget_ceiling_tokens.description: Hard cap for this dispatch's cumulative token use. The dispatcher checks the §13.1 projection against this value BEFORE any provider call and returns a synthetic BudgetExhausted response if projected exhaustion exceeds the ceiling.

billing_tag.description: §13.3 billing tag. MUST match the session's billing tag or the dispatcher emits BillingTagMismatch.

idempotency_key.description: Stable across adapter-level retries of the same logical request. Adapters whose providers accept idempotency tokens MUST propagate this key.
